survey_title: Water Intake Reminder Use and Daily Energy Stability Questionnaire
description: This survey assesses your use of reminders for water intake and the stability of your daily energy levels.

questions.text: How often do you use reminders (app, alarm, or habit) to drink water throughout the day?

options.label: Multiple times a day — always reminded

questions.text: How stable is your energy level throughout the day when you are well-hydrated?

options.label: Very stable — consistent energy all day

questions.text: How many glasses of water do you typically drink per day?
How often do you experience headaches that you believe are related to dehydration?

options.label: Rarely — once a month or less
Sometimes — a few times a month

questions.text: How well do you concentrate on mental tasks during a typical day?

options.label: Excellent — sharp and focused all day
Good — mostly focused with minor lapses

questions.text: How often do you feel physically fatigued by midday?
How frequently do you replace water with sugary drinks (sodas, juices) as your main beverage?

options.label: Never — water is my primary drink
Rarely — occasionally have a sugary drink
Sometimes — a few times a week
Always — I rarely drink plain water

questions.text: How often do you notice dry mouth or excessive thirst during the day?
How satisfied are you with your current water-drinking habits?

options.label: Very satisfied — my habits are excellent
Dissatisfied — I know I should drink more
Very dissatisfied — my habits are poor

questions.text: How often do you drink water before or during physical activity?
How often do you experience mood changes or irritability that you associate with not drinking enough water?
How often do you track your daily water intake (app, journal, water bottle markers)?

options.label: Every day — I actively track it
Never — I don't track it at all

questions.text: How often do you drink a glass of water immediately upon waking up in the morning?
How does your productivity at work or study relate to your hydration habits?

options.label: Very high productivity — hydration helps greatly
Good productivity — hydration has a positive effect
Low productivity — often dehydrated at work
Very low — dehydration significantly affects my work

questions.text: How often do you feel dizzy or lightheaded, possibly due to insufficient water intake?

options.label: Sometimes — a few times a month

questions.text: How aware are you of the recommended daily water intake for your body weight and activity level?

options.label: Very aware — I know exactly and follow it
Mostly aware — I have a general idea
Somewhat aware — I've heard general advice
Slightly aware — I'm not sure of the details

questions.text: How often do you consume caffeine (coffee, energy drinks) as a substitute for water?

options.label: Never — I drink plenty of water instead
Rarely — occasionally have one caffeinated drink
Always — caffeine is my main fluid source

questions.text: How often do you feel that your skin appears dull or dry, which you attribute to low water intake?

options.label: Never — my skin looks healthy and hydrated

questions.text: How often do you feel motivated to increase your water intake after experiencing low-energy episodes?

options.label: Often — I try to drink more
Sometimes — I think about it but forget
Rarely — I don't connect the two
Never — I don't associate energy with hydration

questions.text: Overall, how would you rate your hydration habits and their effect on your daily energy stability?

options.label: Excellent — I am well-hydrated with stable energy
Good — generally hydrated with minor issues
Very poor — consistently dehydrated and low energy

psychological_states.label: Excellent Hydration & Energy
psychological_states.description: Outstanding reminder use and energy stability. Your habits are exemplary — keep it up!

psychological_states.label: Good Hydration Habits
psychological_states.description: Good habits with minor gaps. Continue your current routine and make small improvements.

psychological_states.label: Moderate Stability
psychological_states.description: Moderate hydration consistency. Increasing daily water reminders is recommended.

psychological_states.label: Low Energy — Prioritise Hydration
psychological_states.description: Low energy levels likely linked to irregular hydration. Set structured reminders and monitor intake.

psychological_states.label: Poor Hydration Patterns
psychological_states.description: Poor hydration habits with significant energy instability. Seek nutritional or lifestyle guidance.
